falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if at least 2 of 3 metrics pass: official FX devaluation exceeds 30 percent around the lift, reserves change is better than -20 percent over roughly 90 days, and average monthly CPI inflation rises by more than 1pp after the event. REFUTED if 1 or fewer pass.

metrics.description: Official retail peso/USD rate jumped after cepo lift.
International reserves did not collapse over the next 90 days.
Monthly CPI inflation was higher in the six months after the devaluation.
